name: nodejs_webhook_listener_v2
description: Webhook listener with persistent storage, cookie-based auth, and web UI

scripts.test: node --test --test-force-exit --test-concurrency=1 test/config.test.js test/models/userModel.test.js test/models/sessionModel.test.js test/models/endpointModel.test.js test/models/webhookModel.test.js test/middleware/auth.test.js test/routes/webhookReceiver.test.js test/routes/apiRoutes.test.js test/routes/pageRoutes.test.js test/auth/loginFlow.test.js
